creator: lioux@uol.com.br
text:
I know I should have stepped in before.
	What about following the qt stanza?
	I maintain icqlib and kicq. Icqlib is version 1.0.0;
therefore, branch 1.x.x. However, I won't touch the naming
port convention of this one now.
	Yours is the old version, branch 0.x.x. What about adding
this as icqlib0? Zero series.  And do it first as a repo copy of
icqlib?
	Besides, we could share port logic. For examples,
check:
 	- ports/net/coda5_client and ports/net/coda5_server
	- ports/mail/qmail and ports/mail/qmail-ldap

	You don't need to send another PR. Either follow up on
this one or work it out in PVT with me. :)

-- 
Mario S F Ferreira - UnB - Brazil - "I guess this is a signature."
lioux at ( freebsd dot org | linf dot unb dot br )
flames to beloved devnull@someotherworldbeloworabove.org
